title: Foward to the Past
description: In an experiment gone wrong, Mickey and the Professor find themselves in a different time. Can their paddle steamer reach 99 miles per hour and get them back home?
quote: Rivers? Where we’re going, we don’t need rivers.
altHero: the Professor dressed like a southern plantation owner, with Mickey, a teen in a puffy vest and holding a hover board
alt1: Mickey and the Professor by a paddle steamer boat
alt3: Mickey and a woman look concerned as the Professor steers the boat
alt4: the paddle steamer on wheels, on land, glowing and driving toward the camera
